productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Team Feather Light 2 White Sports Shoes
description: Soar to the skies and earn those winning points in style with the adidas Team Feather shoe. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and with absolute lightweight comfort, these are poised to set you soaring.UpperSynthetic leather upper with portions in high gloss finish for maximum durability and lightweight comfort Interchangeable adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the medial side in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceWraparound overlays for absolute midfoot and back foot protectionSynthetic overlay at the back heel collar for enhanced backfoot protection and supportPerforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilationToe box for maximum forefoot protectionMeshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customized FitMidsoleCompression moulded EVA midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded EVA insole for in-step comfortOutsoleDurable non-marking rubber outsole with wave pattern for absolute grip and easy moveMent Pivot points on the big toe mound and mid heel for easy 180 degree rotation of the foot Flex grooves on the forefoot for flexible moveMent Arched midfoot for ergonomic comfortShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
